title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code should be viewed as the foundation for building a personal AI operating system rather than just a tool for coding. He presents a framework of selecting skills, automating them, and scaling across teams to create a system that learns and improves over time.
